$comment: Scheduled skill invocations for the investment team. Timezone is America/New_York. Registered on --clean deploys via the openclaw CLI / scheduled-tasks MCP surface. Keep cron expressions in sync with each skill's trigger section.

jobs.description: Pre-market watchlist rebuild. Posts to #watchlist tagging @Orchestrator for approval.
Pre-market window scan (04:00-09:30 ET). Posts to #market-signals.
Mid-day window scan (09:30-13:00 ET). Posts to #market-signals.
Post-market window scan (16:00-20:00 ET). Posts to #market-signals.
Daily earnings beat/miss roundup + 7-day rolling tracker. Posts to #market-signals.
Sunday evening weekly wrap + red-folder calendar for the coming week. Posts to #weekly-outlook.
